message: ▶️ 开始流水线: pair (check → build → test → push → deploy)

⚙️ [pair] 检查: npx tsc --noEmit | npx eslint src/ | npx vue-tsc --noEmit | npx eslint -c rules/eslint-vue.mjs src/ | mvn compile -Xlint:all | mvn checkstyle:check -Dcheckstyle.config=rules/checkstyle.xml | mvn compile -Xlint:all
▶️ 开始流水线: pair-backend (check → build → test → push → deploy)

⚙️ [pair-backend] 检查: npx tsc --noEmit | npx eslint src/ | npx vue-tsc --noEmit | npx eslint -c rules/eslint-vue.mjs src/ | mvn compile -Xlint:all | mvn checkstyle:check -Dcheckstyle.config=rules/checkstyle.xml | mvn compile -Xlint:all
🔍 检测到 1 个 Git 远程仓库，点击「🔍 从 Git 检测」按钮导入
🔧 命令: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\IDEA\Project\ci-cd\ci-runner.ps1 -Action check -ProjectPath D:\IDEA\Project\pair-backend -Json
⚙️ [pair-backend] 构建: npm run build | mvn clean package -DskipTests | mvn clean install -DskipTests
🔧 命令: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\IDEA\Project\ci-cd\ci-runner.ps1 -Action check -ProjectPath D:\IDEA\Project\pair -Json
⚙️ [pair] 构建: npm run build | mvn clean package -DskipTests | mvn clean install -DskipTests
🔧 命令: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\IDEA\Project\ci-cd\ci-runner.ps1 -Action build -ProjectPath D:\IDEA\Project\pair-backend -Json
⚙️ [pair-backend] 测试: npx vitest run --reporter=json | npx jest --json --coverage | mvn test -Dmaven.test.failure.ignore=true
🔧 命令: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\IDEA\Project\ci-cd\ci-runner.ps1 -Action test -ProjectPath D:\IDEA\Project\pair-backend -Json
⚙️ [pair-backend] 部署: SFTP 上传 dist/ → $remote_dir/ | SFTP 上传 target/*.jar → $remote_dir/ | SFTP 上传各子模块 jar → $remote_dir/services/
